nodes.name: Black-legged dacnis
nodes.summary: The black-legged dacnis (Dacnis nigripes) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is native to the serra do Mar coastal forests. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The black-legged dacnis (Dacnis nigripes) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is native to the serra do Mar coastal forests.

nodes.name: Serra do Mar coastal forests
nodes.summary: Serra do Mar coastal forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、紅尾鸚鵡、Serra do Mar tyrant-manakin等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Dacnis
